name: Frozen Guacamole
recipeInstructions:
1. Halve avocados lengthwise; remove pits and peel.
2. Mash avocado in a bowl with a potato masher.
3. Add onion, chili pepper, vinegar, and salt; mix well.
4. Place mixture in a plastic freezer container and cover lightly.
5. Freeze until ready to serve.
6. To serve, let thaw; finely chop tomato.
7. Stir chopped tomato into avocado mixture.
8. Serve with raw vegetables, cooked shrimp or chips.
Note: Excellent fresh and good after frozen.
